seo.title: Plans - DeComer
seo.description: Weekly fresh meal subscription. From $10,560 per meal with delivery included.

standard.title: Basic
features: You pick from the fixed menu

premium.title: Full
features: You pick from the fixed menu

items.label: Are the meals frozen?
items.content: No. We never freeze anything. We cook today and deliver tomorrow.

items.label: Where do you deliver?
items.content: Córdoba Capital. Neighborhoods: Nueva Córdoba, Centro, Cerro, Urca, Cofico, Alberdi, General Paz and surroundings.

items.label: Can I choose my meals?
items.content: Yes. We have a fixed menu with all options always available. You pick what you want.

items.label: Can I pause my subscription?
items.content: Yes, whenever you want. Pause or cancel from the app with no hassle.

items.label: Can I change plans?
items.content: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time.

items.label: Do you offer support?
items.content: Yes, via WhatsApp and email. We respond quickly.

seo.title: Menu
seo.description: See DeComer's menu. Fresh, delicious, ready to eat. Delivery in Córdoba Capital.
